task_name: D3 Strategy Status Audit — Read-only UI Display
safety_disclaimers_displayed: D3 is not a prediction model.
Contract validation is not strategy evaluation.
Passing contract validation does not imply improved prediction accuracy.
This page is historical/read-only evidence, not betting advice.
d3_lifecycle_separation_method: Two column groups with different header colors: lifecycle/evidence in blue (#58a6ff), D3 contract in purple (#8b5cf6) with a visual border separator
no_db_query_proof: UI fetches only /api/replay/d3-strategy-status-audit via browser fetch(). No sqlite3, DatabaseManager, or backend DB path is called from JS. The API route itself is artifact-backed (P258N confirmed).
no_d3_execution_proof: JS calls only /api/replay/d3-strategy-status-audit. No run_contract_validation_flow(), gate_statistics, gate_orchestrator, or any executable D3 module is invoked.
no_strategy_evaluation_proof: UI renders rows as read-only display. No scoring, ranking, or recommendation logic exists in the JS. D3 contract status column is explicitly labeled as non-approval.
no_forbidden_d3_statuses_proof: D3_STATUS_LABELS and D3_STATUS_COLORS dicts in JS contain only the 5 allowed statuses. APPROVED/PROMOTED/PRODUCTION_READY/RECOMMENDED/PREDICTIVE_EDGE_CONFIRMED are not in any JS string.
no_db_recommendation_production_registry: index.html JS block contains no backend imports, DB connections, registry mutations, recommendation logic, or deployment calls.

future_task_split.next_allowed_task: P258P: read-only E2E / UX / safety closeout only, if explicitly authorized
future_task_split.running_d3_on_real_candidate_methods: FORBIDDEN — requires separate future task and explicit authorization beyond P258P
